title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, former quant trader managing $10 billion daily in trading strategies, left Wall Street to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange. The interview covers his critique that high-frequency trading adds no societal value, the financial incentives trapping talented mathematicians in finance, and his decision to rebuild traditional market infrastructure.
